name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
"Oh dear! Let me heal you, poor thing..."

It was a nice and peaceful day in the Cookie Kingdom. Pure Vanilla Cookie had taken a stroll by himself beyond the grand walls to enjoy nature when he encountered a wounded individual. Naturally, he needed to help them!
